title: Tender Roast Argentinian Persian Cucumber Roast
description: A nutty and light Argentinian dish featuring Persian cucumber, perfect for a special occasion, this roast is made in a hot pot vessel and is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the hot pot vessel to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Heat the olive oil in the hot pot vessel and sear the beef roast until browned on all sides.
Add the sliced Persian cucumber to the hot pot vessel and cook until tender.
Add the chimichurri sauce, lemon juice, and chicken broth to the hot pot vessel and stir to combine.
Cover the hot pot vessel and cook for 2 hours or until the beef is tender.
Remove the hot pot vessel from the heat and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Slice the beef roast and serve with the Persian cucumber and sauce.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
